rows.leaf_description: Reimbursement for dental implants.

metadata.conditions: If partner implantologist Sévéane: +500€ (1000€ total)

cells.notes: This coverage is for 'Pose de l'implant (phase opératoire)'. An additional 184€ is covered for 'Faux-moignon implantaire'. The taxonomy leaf 'Implants dentaires' is broad, so I'm taking the main implant coverage and noting the additional component. Both have a limit of 3 acts per year per beneficiary. Total for implant + faux-moignon would be 800€ per act, up to 3 acts per year per beneficiary.

bounding_boxes.file_id: File #1 - Laurent M - Conditions particulières - Socle AXA - SAE

rows.rationale: AXA offers coverage of €800 per implant (up to 3 per year), or potentially €2,400, while ProBTP caps it at €500/year (€1,000 with network), which is less advantageous for several implants.

rows.leaf_description: Dental prevention procedures (annual scaling and prophylactic sealing for children under 14)

cells.notes: Unmappable: These are specific preventive dental acts highlighted as 'intégrés au contrat' regardless of level, suggesting a distinct benefit beyond standard SS-reimbursed care. While detartrage and scellement are often SS-reimbursed, their explicit mention as a 'plus' warrants a separate leaf for clarity on preventive benefits.

rows.rationale: ProBTP explicitly includes coverage for specific preventive procedures (annual scaling, prophylactic sealing for children), not explicitly covered by AXA.

It warrants its own leaf under 'Prothèses dentaires' or a new sub-category for 'Prothèses non prises en charge par la SS'.
